executionHistory.summary: Re-scoped from Job-interface refactor (which would change exported scheduler.New signature) to pragmatic file extraction. Moved Stop+runGuarded to lifecycle.go, retry-state accessors+CronEntryCount to state.go, MealPlanAutoCompleter+SetKnowledgeLinter+SetMealPlanAutoComplete to registration.go. Factored 10-entry intelligence-engine cron registration into private scheduleEngineJobs helper. scheduler.go reduced from 213 to 122 LOC (target ≤150). Zero exported API change; sole consumer cmd/core/main.go untouched for scheduler API.

go test -count=1 ./internal/scheduler/... returns ok in 5.026s. ./smackerel.sh test unit returns ok across all 41 Go packages and 330 Python tests pass. All pre-existing scheduler tests (TestStop_*, TestFormatAlertMessage_*, TestDeliverPendingAlerts_*, TestCronConcurrencyGuard_*, TestRelationshipCoolingUsesOwnMutex, etc.) PASS without modification.

wc -l scheduler.go = 122 (target ≤150). grep -E '^func ' confirms function placement: New+Start+scheduleEngineJobs in scheduler.go, Stop+runGuarded in lifecycle.go, retry accessors+CronEntryCount in state.go, SetKnowledgeLinter+SetMealPlanAutoComplete in registration.go. grep on cmd/core/main.go confirms scheduler.New(...) and sched.Start(ctx, cronExpr) call sites are unchanged. ./smackerel.sh format --check and lint both pass; go vet clean.
Artifact lint PASSED for BUG-002-scheduler-god-orchestrator. All 6 DoD items checked with inline real-terminal evidence. State, scope status, and report all coherent.
Bug closed. Status promoted to done with real captured evidence.

completedScopes: Scope 1: Extract scheduler methods to ≤150 LOC

notes: Scheduler god-orchestrator file extraction. Re-scoped from Job-interface refactor (forbidden under no-API-change rule) to pragmatic file extraction. Verified at HEAD on 2026-04-24 with real captured commands. scheduler.go = 122 LOC (target ≤150). 3 sibling files added: lifecycle.go (46), state.go (28), registration.go (26).
